business.name: Juniper Oven
business.summary: A warm Flagstaff bakery concept centered on fresh bread, pastries, and simple cafe fare.

audience.primary: Flagstaff residents and visitors looking for fresh baked food in a welcoming local setting
needs: A clear view of the menu

offerings.name: Fresh bread
offerings.description: Daily loaves made for the table or a quick stop.

offerings.name: Cafe fare
offerings.description: Simple food and drinks for breakfast or lunch.

offerings.name: Order ahead
offerings.description: A convenient option for planned pickups when available.

brand.aesthetic: A high desert bakehouse with warm clay surfaces, deep juniper green, natural paper textures, and close food photography.

signatureMove.name: Juniper trail
signatureMove.description: A fine botanical line traces down the page as visitors move through the story, connecting the oven, menu, and visit sections.
signatureMove.touchFallback: The complete line appears as a static visual guide, with every section and action always visible.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: The line is shown fully drawn with no animation.

content.headline: Fresh from the oven. Made for the day ahead.
content.subheadline: Bread, pastries, and simple cafe fare inspired by the warmth and character of the high desert.
content.about: Juniper Oven is envisioned as a welcoming place for fresh baked food and an easy daily stop. The experience should feel thoughtful, local, and grounded in Flagstaff.
content.contactPrompt: Have a question about an order, ingredients, or your visit? Get in touch with the team.

inferred.label: Core offerings
inferred.value: Fresh bread, pastries, cafe fare, and possible order ahead service

inferred.label: Brand positioning
inferred.value: A warm, craft focused high desert bakehouse
